content.query:
--CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_employee_extended

--AS 

Select Top(10)

 aa.PersonID
,aa.EmployeeFirstName
,aa.EmployeeLastName
,aa.EmployeeName
,aa.GenderID
,aa.Gender
,aa.DOB
,aa.EmployeeNumber
,aa.LegacyEmployeeNumber
,aa.CivilServiceStartDate
,aa.DateToCurrentJob
,aa.DateToSubstantiveGrade
,aa.SeniorityDate
,aa.RoleStartDate
,aa.FixTermEndDate
,aa.LoanStartDate
,aa.LoanEndDate
,aa.ReasonForAction
,aa.AnnualSalary
,aa.Currency
,aa.Postcode
,aa.AddressLine1
,aa.AddressLine2
,aa.AddressLine3
,aa.City
,aa.County
,aa.FTEPercentage
,aa.FTE
,aa.WorkHours
,aa.EmploymentStatus
,aa.PartTimeEmployee
,aa.EmployeeGroupCode
,aa.EmployeeGroup
,aa.CostCenterCode
,aa.CostCenterCentre
,aa.PositionCode
,aa.Position
,aa.WorkScheduleID
,aa.WorkScheduleRule
,aa.WorkWeekDays
,aa.WorkWeekHours
,aa.WorkDayHours
,aa.Grade
,aa.GradeDescription
,aa.GradeGroupV1
,aa.GradeGroupV2
,aa.JobCategoryShort
,aa.JobCategory
,aa.PersonnelAreaCode
,aa.PersonnelArea
,aa.PayrollAreaCode
,aa.PayrollArea
,aa.OrganisationUnitCode
,aa.OrganisationUnit
,aa.PersonnelSubAreaCode
,aa.PersonnelSubArea
,aa.WorkContractCode
,aa.WorkContract
,aa.WorkContractType
,aa.IsActive


,bb.L1ManagerID
,bb.L1ManagerFirstName
,bb.L1ManagerLastName
,bb.L1ManagerName
,bb.L2ManagerID
,bb.L2ManagerFirstName
,bb.L2ManagerLastName
,bb.L2ManagerName

FROM

--Employee Details

mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee aa

LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee_manager_details bb
ON aa.PersonID = bb.PersonID 

--Work Contract Details
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_work_contract cc
----ON aa.WorkContractID = cc.WorkContractID

--Grade and Role Details
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_grade dd
--ON aa.GradeID = dd.GradeID

--Personnel Area
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_area ee
--ON aa.PersonnelAreaID = ee.PersonnelAreaID

--Personnel Sub Area
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_personnel_sub_area ff
--ON aa.PersonnelSubAreaID = ff.PersonnelSubAreaID

--Payroll Area
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_payroll_area gg
--ON aa.PayrollAreaID = gg.PayrollAreaID

--Organisational Unit
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_organisation_unit hh
--ON aa.OrganisationalUnitID = hh.OrganisationUnitID

--Gender
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_gender mm
--ON aa.GenderID = mm.GenderID

--CostCentre
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_costcentre nn
--ON aa.CostCenterID = nn.CostCenterID

--EmployeeGRoup
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employeegroup oo
--ON aa.EmployeeGroupID = oo.EmployeeGroupID

--Position
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_position pp
--ON aa.PositionID = pp.PositionID

--Position
--LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_work_schedule qq
--ON aa.WorkScheduleID = qq.WorkScheduleID

GO
